examples: When I asked for help, he just smiled loftily and turned away.
They loftily on the cloud, the sun and the moon following them.
More silent than my shadow, I pass through the loftily covetous multitude.
But who, as a patrician British prime minister, Harold Macmillan, once loftily asked, are these middle classes?
After each debacle, Mr Chirac loftily calls on the right to end its squabbles and rally round some new theme.
